info.title: Teachify API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Teachify application - A comprehensive educational platform API

post.summary: Update a course (use POST with _method=PATCH for multipart)
Create a one-off or recurring session
Generate (or regenerate) a signed QR token for a session

200.description: QR token — render this as a QR code on the frontend

post.summary: Enroll a student into a group

201.description: Enrolled — first-month invoice auto-created (prorated if mid-month)

get.summary: List all enrollments for a student
List all enrollments for a group
List subjects visible to this channel (channel-specific + general)

parameters.name: is_general
parameters.description: true = general subjects only, false = channel-specific only

200.description: Paginated subject list with locale-aware names

post.summary: Create a channel-specific subject with bilingual translations

get.summary: Get a subject with all translations

404.description: Subject not found or belongs to another channel
Subject not found or belongs to another channel

post.summary: Student scans QR code — auto-detects present vs late

token.description: QR token from session QR endpoint

201.description: Attendance recorded — status auto-set to present or late

409.description: Student was manually marked absent — QR scan blocked

422.description: Student already checked in for this session

get.summary: Live attendance for a session — poll this for realtime updates

200.description: Current attendance state with summary counts
Statistics: total, present, absent, late, excused, attendance_rate

get.description: Display a listing of the resource.

post.summary: Register a new channel and owner user

201.description: Channel and user created — OTP sent to email

422.description: Already verified or user not found

post.summary: Login with email or phone + password

403.description: Email not verified or account blocked

post.summary: Request a password-reset OTP via email

422.description: Validation error or system role conflict
System role cannot be deleted, or role is assigned to users

post.summary: Create a new staff user in the channel

403.description: Insufficient permissions — requires users.delete, or self-deletion attempt

post.summary: Create an invoice (monthly, ad-hoc, session, or enrollment fee)

422.description: Validation error — reason required for ad_hoc type

post.summary: Create an invoice and split it into installments

200.description: Overdue invoice list — sorted by due_date asc

get.summary: List pending invoices not yet due

post.summary: Add a guardian to a student

delete.summary: Remove a guardian from a student

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, code, email, or phone

get.summary: Get a student with groups and guardians

tags.name: Enrollments
tags.description: Student enrollment into groups — nested fees and first-invoice proration

tags.name: Subjects
tags.description: Subject management — channel-specific and general subjects. All routes under /api/v1/{channel_slug}/subjects

tags.name: Attendance
tags.description: Attendance management — manual marking, QR scan, live session view

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Channel role management — all routes under /api/v1/{channel_slug}/roles

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Channel staff user management — all routes under /api/v1/{channel_slug}/users

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice management — ad-hoc dues, monthly billing, installments

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Record and manage student payments — requires payments.* permissions

tags.name: Guardians
tags.description: Student guardian / parent management — nested under /api/v1/{channel_slug}/students/{student}/guardians
